title: Autonomous Growth Platform — Wave 3 (Enhancement + QA loop)

executive_summary.headline: Wave 3 orchestrator deployed. Dry-run snapshot succeeded: 0 enhanced images yet, 20 creative_assets pending QA, $10/day AI budget cap enforced. No AI spend incurred — live runs gated behind explicit UI buttons.

implementation_summary.what: Ships agp-wave3-enhance-qa, an orchestrator that (1) snapshots enhance + QA backlog, (2) enqueues 'enhance' jobs for products missing a hosted enhanced image, (3) drives cpe-image-enhancer in 3-image slices respecting the AGP daily_budget_usd cap, (4) drives cpe-qa-engine to grade pending creative_assets, and (5) writes counters + step logs to agp_runs/agp_run_steps. Adds a Wave 3 card to /admin/autonomous-growth with Dry-run / Run small (6) / Run batch (20) buttons.
implementation_summary.why: Establish the metered Enhancement + QA loop so future waves (lifestyle, creative variation, video) operate on graded, QA-passed source images instead of raw CJ supplier shots — without burning the entire daily budget in a single click.
implementation_summary.expected_impact: Operator-driven enhancement of source product imagery at ~$0.05/image with daily-budget enforcement; pending creative_assets are graded automatically on the same run. Live publishing remains OFF.

files.reason: Wave 3 orchestrator: snapshot + enqueue + enhancer slices + QA pass + post-snapshot, with daily-budget halt.
Added Wave 3 control card (Dry-run / Run small 6 / Run batch 20).

data_changes: 1 row inserted into agp_runs (dry-run validation, status=succeeded)

ai_usage.budget_enforcement: Orchestrator halts enhancer loop when cumulative spent_usd ≥ agp_settings.daily_budget_usd.

pinterest.changes: None. Publishing remains OFF until Wave 7.

quality_control.scoring_scale: 0-100, threshold for approval = all checks pass.

performance.rate_limiting: Enhancer self-rate-limits via 0.05 USD/call withinBudget check.

security.auth: isInternalAuthed via INTERNAL_FUNCTION_SECRET on cpe-image-enhancer / cpe-qa-engine; AGP orchestrator accepts user JWT or x-internal-secret.
security.rls: No new tables. cpe_enhanced_images / cpe_creative_jobs already admin-only.

high: Run 'Run small (6 imgs)' once to validate live enhancer + storage round-trip (~$0.30).
Confirm cpe_enhanced_images rows render correctly with private signed URLs before scaling.
medium: After 6-image validation, run 'Run batch (20)' (~$1.00) to seed a representative sample.
Add a QA rejection auto-requeue (max 1 retry) before dead-letter — currently rejections stay in qa_failed.
low: Surface per-product enhanced-image preview in admin product detail page.
Add a 'force re-enhance' button for products with quality_score < 70.
